markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Jackie Young records 7+ assists in the Indiana at Las Vegas women's professional basketball game originally scheduled for Jul 12, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the Indiana at Las Vegas women's professional basketball game originally scheduled for Jul 12, 2026. If a player is active but never takes the court, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game the market settles based on the player's assists recorded.

markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Francesco Passaro vs Martin Krumich professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Bastad Qualification Final. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks). If a retirement occurs, all markets that can be unconditionally settled based on play already completed will resolve accordingly. Any markets that cannot be unconditionally settled will resolve to Fair Market Price, as determined at the sole discretion of the Exchange.
